package rulefixtures

import (
	"sync"
)

// scenario for shared_slice_append_race: goroutines appending to a shared slice without synchronization
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario732Positive(items []string) []string {
	var out []string
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for _, item := range items {
		wg.Add(1)
		go func(value string) { defer wg.Done(); out = append(out, value) }(item)
	}
	wg.Wait()
	return out
}
